recommendations.title: Vampire Sisters 2: Bats in the Belly
recommendations.overview: Teen half vampire Dakaria falls in love with rock singer vampire Murdo. Dakaria, her friends and family have to face vampire Xantor who has dark plans.

recommendations.title: Vampire's Kiss
recommendations.overview: A publishing executive is visited and bitten by a vampire and starts exhibiting erratic behavior. He pushes his secretary to extremes as he tries to come to terms with his affliction.

recommendations.title: Queen of the Damned
recommendations.overview: Vampire Lestat awakens from his slumber and becomes a rock star. But chaos strikes when his music awakens Akasha, the vampire queen, who may not rest until she makes Lestat her new king.

recommendations.title: The Last Man on Earth
recommendations.overview: When a disease turns all of humanity into the living dead, the last man on earth becomes a reluctant vampire hunter.

recommendations.title: Abraham Lincoln Vampire Hunter: The Great Calamity
recommendations.overview: A motion comic follow-up to a chapter from Abraham Lincoln Vampire Hunter novel where Abe's friend, Edgar Allan Poe, tells him the tale of historical Hungarian countess Elizabeth Bathory, often tied to vampire legends due to her brutality.

recommendations.title: Vampyr
recommendations.overview: Allan Gray, a young man fascinated by the supernatural, goes to a small village where he feels a sinister force descending upon him. There, Allan meets an old man who asks him to protect his two daughters, for one of them has been bitten by a vampire

recommendations.title: Yakuza Apocalypse
recommendations.overview: When young protege Akira Kageyama is bitten by his dying vampire boss, Genyo Kamiura, he must get used to his new powers before seeking revenge.

recommendations.title: Day Shift
recommendations.overview: An LA vampire hunter has a week to come up with the cash to pay for his kid's tuition and braces. Trying to make a living these days just might kill him.

recommendations.title: Kizumonogatari Part 2: Nekketsu
recommendations.overview: Koyomi Araragi was turned into a vampire by the legendary vampire, Kiss-shot Acerola-orion Heart-under-blade, and he needs to revive the weakened vampire back to her complete form to return to being human again. The only way for Koyomi to achieve his

recommendations.title: Fright Night
recommendations.overview: A teenager suspects his new neighbour is a vampire. Unable to convince anyone, he tries to enlist the help of a self-proclaimed vampire hunter and magician.
